title: Grilled Fish Tagine with Flaky Crust
description: A flavorful and moist fish dish wrapped in a crispy, flaky crust, inspired by the traditional North African tagine style.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and place the fish fillet in the center.
Drizzle the Brazilian olive oil over the fish and sprinkle with tagine spice blend.
Fold the pastry over the fish and press the edges to seal.
Place the fish tagine on a baking sheet and brush with a little more olive oil.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the fish is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
